name: agentic-contact-center
description: ClueCon 2026 agentic contact center POC scaffold

scripts.docker:proof: sh -c 'LOCAL_UID=${LOCAL_UID:-$(id -u)} LOCAL_GID=${LOCAL_GID:-$(id -g)} docker compose run --rm proof'
scripts.docker:smoke: sh -c 'cleanup(){ docker compose down --remove-orphans; }; trap cleanup EXIT; docker compose up --build -d app && node scripts/health-smoke.mjs --url http://127.0.0.1:8026/health'
